name: Robot Vacuum
description: A self-navigating robot vacuum with LiDAR mapping, 2700Pa suction, and up to 150-minute runtime. Schedules via app or voice assistant.
details: Works on hard floors and carpet
Compatible with Alexa and Google Home

rows.label: Floor types
rows.value: Hard floors and carpet up to 2 cm pile

rows.label: Smart home
rows.value: Amazon Alexa, Google Home, app control
